193 F0500G_FRSH_AIR_CD F0500G_FRSH_AIR_CD F0500G Interview for Activity Preferences: Time Outdoors Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates how important it is that they go outside and get fresh air when the weather is good while they are a resident in the current facility. -=Not assessed/no information
1=Very important
2=Somewhat important
3=Not very important
4=Not important at
